title: Aggressive cows
hints: Sort the array of stall positions first.
Use binary search on answer to find the largest minimum distance.
The minimum distance is at least 1, and at most (max(A) - min(A)).
For a given distance 'mid', check if it's possible to place B cows with minimum distance 'mid'.
In the check function, greedily place cows starting from the first stall, ensuring each new cow is at least 'mid' distance away from the previous one.
If a distance is feasible, try to find a larger distance. Otherwise, decrease the distance.
Return the largest feasible minimum distance.
